prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-BLE-FLEXCUTMAT-CLR-2PK Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Frosted 2pk Flexible Cutting Boards Chopping Mats, Kitchen Accessories Meal Prep, 12x15 Inch Description: Simple, reliable, BPA-free and incredibly lightweight, these thin flexible cutting mats from Beille are the perfect surface for all kinds of food prep. Measuring just 0.5mm in thickness and weighing in at only 0.25lbs, the flexible plastic cutting boards take up no room in your kitchen and are easy to maneuver. And, when it comes to storage, the cutting boards can be rolled up, laid flat or hung on a hook when not in use, making them pantry storage and organization friendly.

As mentioned, these thin, clear cutting mats are extremely lightweight and flexible, streamlining all your food prep to pan transportation; creating a funnel when the sides are folded together, you can easily unload chopped ingredients into waiting pots and pans without the awkwardness and heavy weight of traditional wood cutting boards. Plus, the chopping mats won't dull knives either.

Lastly, material and fabrication: the polypropylene plastic material used to make this cutting board set is both non-porous and non-absorbent, helping to prevent any cross contamination, and make them easy to keep clean (to wash, use hot water soap). The cutting mats are also dishwasher safe.

Bonus: The chopping mats can also double as place mats or activity mats for kids too. Search Terms: house warming gifts new home dorm essentials new house essentials pantry organization and storage meal prep food prep cooking baking supplies chef wedding gifts kitchen basics kitchen starter set chopping mats placemats activity mats for baby Features: - FOOD PREP KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: Simple, reliable, BPA-free and lightweight, these thin flexible clear cutting mats are the perfect surface for all kinds of food prep; the chopping mats won't dull knives and can double as place mats or activity mats for kids too! - PANTRY ORGANIZATION AND STORAGE FRIENDLY: Measuring just 0.5mm in thickness, the cutting boards take up hardly any room no matter where or how you store them; the cutting boards can be rolled up, laid flat or hung on a hook for quick and efficient storage; dishwasher safe - FLEXIBLE EASY TO USE DESIGN: These thin, clear cutting mats are very flexible, streamlining food prep to pan transportation; creating a funnel when the sides are pulled together, you can easily unload chopped ingredients into waiting pots and pans without the awkwardness and heavy weight of traditional wood cutting boards - BPA FREE FOOD SAFE MATERIAL: The polypropylene plastic material used to make this cutting board set is both non-porous and non-absorbent helping to prevent any cross contamination, and making them easy to keep clean - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 12 x 15 inches; Color: Frosted; Material: BPA free PP plastic; Weight: 2.4oz; Thickness: 0.5mm; Dishwasher Safe: Yes === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: Beille 2-Pk 12x15 In Frosted Flexible Cutting Boards

anthropic.title_differentiation: BPA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Space-Saving Design, Won't Dull Knives, Non-Porous Material

openai.title_differentiation: BPA Free PP Plastic, Dishwasher Safe, Knife Friendly, Non Porous, Lightweight, Rolls For Easy Storage
